problem.title: Bitwise AND of Numbers Range
problem.description: Given two integers left and right that represent the range [left, right], return the bitwise AND of all numbers in this range, inclusive.

example.explanation: 5&6&7 = 101&110&111 = 100 = 4. Equivalently, find the common left prefix of left and right in binary.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Bit Manipulation [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: The bitwise AND of all numbers in [left, right] equals the common bit prefix of left and right. Any bit that differs between left and right will eventually be zeroed out by some number in the range, so we repeatedly right-shift both values until they are equal, then shift back to restore the prefix.
solutions.code_python:
def rangeBitwiseAnd(left: int, right: int) -> int:
    shift = 0
    while left < right:
        left >>= 1
        right >>= 1
        shift += 1
    return left << shift
